statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesIngress hostnames and load balancer DNS names to TailscaleService nodes. Service matches are scoped to tailnets whose DNS suffix can be derived unambiguously from TailscaleDevice.name values.
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(ing:KubernetesIngress) WITH ing, [host IN coalesce(ing.load_balancer_dns_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'ingress.load_balancer_dns_names'}] + [host IN coalesce(ing.host_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'ingress.host_names'}] AS endpoints UNWIND endpoints AS endpoint WITH ing, endpoint, CASE WHEN toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)), 0, size(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) END AS host WHERE host ENDS WITH '.ts.net' WITH ing, endpoint, host, split(host, '.')[0] AS short_name, substring(host, size(split(host, '.')[0]) + 1) AS tailnet_suffix MATCH (tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [host, short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + host, 'svc:' + short_name] OPTIONAL MATCH (tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH ing, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, svc, [suffix IN collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.ts.net' THEN substring(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END, size(split(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END, '.')[0]) + 1) ELSE NULL END) WHERE suffix IS NOT NULL] AS tailnet_suffixes WHERE size(tailnet_suffixes) = 1 AND tailnet_suffixes[0] = tailnet_suffix MERGE (ing)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE]->(svc) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = host, r.match_type = 'service_name', r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesService load balancer DNS names to TailscaleService nodes. The KubernetesService.load_balancer_dns_names property is extracted from status.loadBalancer.ingress[].hostname during transform.
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(k8ssvc:KubernetesService) WITH k8ssvc, [host IN coalesce(k8ssvc.load_balancer_dns_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'service.load_balancer_dns_names'}] AS dns_endpoints, [part IN split(coalesce(toString(k8ssvc.load_balancer_ingress), ''), '"hostname"')[1..] WHERE size(split(part, '"')) > 1 | {hostname: split(part, '"')[1], source_field: 'service.load_balancer_ingress.hostname'}] AS json_endpoints WITH k8ssvc, CASE WHEN size(dns_endpoints) > 0 THEN dns_endpoints ELSE json_endpoints END AS endpoints UNWIND endpoints AS endpoint WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, CASE WHEN toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)), 0, size(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) END AS host WHERE host ENDS WITH '.ts.net' WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, split(host, '.')[0] AS short_name, substring(host, size(split(host, '.')[0]) + 1) AS tailnet_suffix MATCH (tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [host, short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + host, 'svc:' + short_name] OPTIONAL MATCH (tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, svc, [suffix IN collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.ts.net' THEN substring(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END, size(split(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END, '.')[0]) + 1) ELSE NULL END) WHERE suffix IS NOT NULL] AS tailnet_suffixes WHERE size(tailnet_suffixes) = 1 AND tailnet_suffixes[0] = tailnet_suffix MERGE (k8ssvc)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_SERVICE]->(svc) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = host, r.match_type = 'service_name', r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesIngress hostnames and load balancer DNS names to TailscaleDevice nodes by exact FQDN or suffix-scoped short hostname, but skip device links when a TailscaleService match exists for the same endpoint.
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(ing:KubernetesIngress) WITH ing, [host IN coalesce(ing.load_balancer_dns_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'ingress.load_balancer_dns_names'}] + [host IN coalesce(ing.host_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'ingress.host_names'}] AS endpoints UNWIND endpoints AS endpoint WITH ing, endpoint, CASE WHEN toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)), 0, size(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) END AS host WHERE host ENDS WITH '.ts.net' WITH ing, endpoint, host, split(host, '.')[0] AS short_name, substring(host, size(split(host, '.')[0]) + 1) AS tailnet_suffix OPTIONAL MATCH (svc_tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [host, short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + host, 'svc:' + short_name] OPTIONAL MATCH (svc_tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc_device:TailscaleDevice) WITH ing, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, svc, [suffix IN collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN svc_device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.ts.net' THEN substring(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(svc_device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(svc_device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) END, size(split(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(svc_device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(svc_device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) END, '.')[0]) + 1) ELSE NULL END) WHERE suffix IS NOT NULL] AS svc_tailnet_suffixes WITH ing, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, count(CASE WHEN svc IS NOT NULL AND size(svc_tailnet_suffixes) = 1 AND svc_tailnet_suffixes[0] = tailnet_suffix THEN 1 END) AS service_matches WHERE service_matches = 0 MATCH (:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH ing, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, device, CASE WHEN device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END AS device_name, toLower(toString(device.hostname)) AS device_hostname WHERE device_name = host OR (device_hostname = short_name AND device_name ENDS WITH '.' + tailnet_suffix) MERGE (ing)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_DEVICE]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = host, r.match_type = CASE WHEN device_name = host THEN 'exact_device_fqdn' ELSE 'device_hostname' END, r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Link KubernetesService load balancer DNS names to TailscaleDevice nodes by exact FQDN or suffix-scoped short hostname, but skip device links when a TailscaleService match exists for the same endpoint.
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(k8ssvc:KubernetesService) WITH k8ssvc, [host IN coalesce(k8ssvc.load_balancer_dns_names, []) WHERE host IS NOT NULL | {hostname: host, source_field: 'service.load_balancer_dns_names'}] AS dns_endpoints, [part IN split(coalesce(toString(k8ssvc.load_balancer_ingress), ''), '"hostname"')[1..] WHERE size(split(part, '"')) > 1 | {hostname: split(part, '"')[1], source_field: 'service.load_balancer_ingress.hostname'}] AS json_endpoints WITH k8ssvc, CASE WHEN size(dns_endpoints) > 0 THEN dns_endpoints ELSE json_endpoints END AS endpoints UNWIND endpoints AS endpoint WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, CASE WHEN toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)), 0, size(toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(endpoint.hostname)) END AS host WHERE host ENDS WITH '.ts.net' WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, split(host, '.')[0] AS short_name, substring(host, size(split(host, '.')[0]) + 1) AS tailnet_suffix OPTIONAL MATCH (svc_tailnet:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc:TailscaleService) WHERE toLower(toString(svc.name)) IN [host, short_name] OR toLower(toString(svc.id)) IN ['svc:' + host, 'svc:' + short_name] OPTIONAL MATCH (svc_tailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(svc_device:TailscaleDevice) WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, svc, [suffix IN collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN svc_device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.ts.net' THEN substring(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(svc_device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(svc_device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) END, size(split(CASE WHEN toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(svc_device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(svc_device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(svc_device.name)) END, '.')[0]) + 1) ELSE NULL END) WHERE suffix IS NOT NULL] AS svc_tailnet_suffixes WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, count(CASE WHEN svc IS NOT NULL AND size(svc_tailnet_suffixes) = 1 AND svc_tailnet_suffixes[0] = tailnet_suffix THEN 1 END) AS service_matches WHERE service_matches = 0 MATCH (:TailscaleTailnet)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:TailscaleDevice) WITH k8ssvc, endpoint, host, short_name, tailnet_suffix, device, CASE WHEN device.name IS NOT NULL AND toLower(toString(device.name)) ENDS WITH '.' THEN substring(toLower(toString(device.name)), 0, size(toLower(toString(device.name))) - 1) ELSE toLower(toString(device.name)) END AS device_name, toLower(toString(device.hostname)) AS device_hostname WHERE device_name = host OR (device_hostname = short_name AND device_name ENDS WITH '.' + tailnet_suffix) MERGE (k8ssvc)-[r:USES_TAILSCALE_DEVICE]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.matched_hostname = host, r.match_type = CASE WHEN device_name = host THEN 'exact_device_fqdn' ELSE 'device_hostname' END, r.source_field = endpoint.source_field

statements.__comment__: Clean up stale KubernetesIngress Tailscale endpoint relationships for this cluster after current links have been merged.
Clean up stale KubernetesService Tailscale endpoint relationships for this cluster after current links have been merged.
